title: Create cloud-native apps and services with .NET and ASP.NET Core
summary: Create independently deployable, highly scalable, and resilient apps and services using the free and open-source .NET platform. With .NET you can use popular microservice technology like Docker, Kubernetes, Dapr, Azure Container Registry, and more for .NET and ASP.NET Core applications and services.

sections.title: Create cloud-native apps and services with .NET and ASP.NET Core
sections.summary: Create independently deployable, highly scalable, and resilient apps and services using the free and open-source .NET platform. With .NET you can use popular microservice technology like Docker, Kubernetes, Dapr, Azure Container Registry, and more for .NET and ASP.NET Core applications and services.

lessons.title: Build your first microservice with .NET
lessons.content_md:
Microservice applications are composed of small, independently versioned, and scalable customer-focused services that communicate with each other by using standard protocols and well-defined interfaces. Each microservice typically encapsulates simple business logic, which you can scale out or in. You test, deploy, and manage the microservice independently. Smaller teams develop a microservice based on a customer scenario, and choose the technologies that they use. This module teaches you how to build your first microservice by using .NET.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/dotnet-microservices/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Deploy a .NET microservice to Kubernetes
lessons.content_md:
Microservice applications are composed of small, independently versioned, and scalable customer-focused services. Microservices applications deployed in containers make it possible to scale out apps, and respond to increased demand by deploying more container instances, and to scale back if demand is decreasing. In complex solutions of many microservices the process of deploying, updating, monitoring, and removing containers introduces challenges. This module explains some of those challenges and shows how Kubernetes can help.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/dotnet-deploy-microservices-kubernetes/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Implement resiliency in a cloud-native .NET microservice
lessons.content_md:
This module guides you through implementing resiliency in an .NET microservices app in a Kubernetes Service.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/microservices-resiliency-aspnet-core/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement resiliency in a cloud-native .NET microservice

lessons.title: Implement observability in a cloud-native .NET 8 application with OpenTelemetry
lessons.content_md:
Learn about observability and how to implement it in a cloud-native application. Use OpenTelemetry packages to output logs, metrics, and tracing data and analyze the data in Application Insights and third-party applications.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-observability-cloud-native-app-with-opentelemetry/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement observability in a cloud-native .NET 8 application with OpenTelemetry

lessons.title: Implement compliance in a cloud-native .NET 8 application
lessons.content_md:
Microservice applications, because of their distributed nature, can be difficult to secure. In this module, you'll learn how to classify sensitive data in a cloud-native application, redact sensitive data in log files, and generate compliance reports for a cloud-native application.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/dotnet-compliance-cloud-native-applications/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement compliance in a cloud-native .NET 8 application

lessons.title: Implement feature flags in a cloud-native ASP.NET Core microservices app
lessons.content_md:
This module guides you through implementing a feature flag in an ASP.NET Core microservices app using Azure App Configuration.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/microservices-configuration-aspnet-core/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement feature flags in a cloud-native ASP.NET Core microservices app

lessons.title: Deploy a cloud-native .NET microservice automatically with GitHub Actions and Azure Pipelines
lessons.content_md:
Use a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline to build a container image and deploy it to Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS).

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/microservices-devops-aspnet-core/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Deploy a cloud-native .NET microservice automatically with GitHub Actions and Azure Pipelines

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Create cloud-native apps and services with .NET and ASP.NET Core
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Create cloud-native apps and services with .NET and ASP.NET Core**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
